_comment: GENERATED / VENDORED from homesignal-ingest/topics/canon.yaml (the authored source of record). Phase 1A: descriptive + inert — used ONLY by test/topic-canon.test.mjs to detect drift against topics.js. Nothing in the runtime imports this. Do not hand-edit; regenerate from the ingest artifact. Copied 2026-07-17.
_government_topics_comment: government_topics_active = strings delivered by the notices digest today (digest.py::CANONICAL_TOPICS). government_topics_pending = real per-city government_notice categories present in feeds.csv but NOT yet delivered (silently dropped today). Pending is recorded here only to make the delivery gap canonical + CI-tracked; NO site runtime reads it and it does NOT change subscription writes or matching.
